utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five corresponding fields. Now check for full specification: (1) health_coverage: specifies type (physical and mental), plan name, benefit limits, deductible, international coverage scope, mental health sessions, cost breakdown and total monthly cost—sufficiently detailed with costs. (2) property_coverage: specifies plan name, coverage amount for contents, specific sub-coverages (smart home devices, temporary accommodation, identity theft), and monthly cost—sufficiently detailed with costs. (3) travel_coverage: specifies plan name, medical emergency coverage limit, trip cancellation/interruption, worldwide coverage, support availability, tech protection limit, and monthly cost—sufficiently detailed with costs. (4) additional_services: specifies services, features, and total monthly cost with breakdown—sufficiently detailed with costs. (5) total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual totals and some comparative savings info—sufficiently detailed as a cost breakdown. All 5 items are present and fully specified with the required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists: LifeFirst Standard Plans for physical and mental health, HomeFirst Standard Coverage for property, TravelFirst Standard Plan for travel, and two additional services: Premium Insurance Membership and Telemedicine Services. Using the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; HomeFirst Standard Coverage rating 7; TravelFirst Standard Plan rating 8; Premium Insurance Membership rating 10; Telemedicine Services rating 9.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Physical and mental health insurance - LifeFirst Standard Plans providing €500,000 annual limit with 5% deductible, international coverage in 45+ countries, 24 sessions per family member annually for mental health, family therapy included - Total cost: €165/month (€100 physical + €65 mental)",
    "property_coverage": "HomeFirst Standard Coverage providing €45,000 contents protection with smart home device protection up to €5,000, temporary accommodation, identity theft protection - Cost: €55/month",
    "travel_coverage": "TravelFirst Standard Plan providing €1,000,000 medical emergency coverage, unlimited trip cancellation/interruption, worldwide coverage with 24/7 multilingual support, technology protection up to €3,000 per incident - Cost: €55/month",
    "additional_services": "Premium Insurance Membership (15% discount on all policies, dedicated advisor, priority claims) + Telemedicine Services (24/7 virtual consultations, prescription delivery) - Total cost: €30/month (€20 + €10)",
    "total_budget": "Complete monthly cost: €263.75/month (€3,165 annually) - Represents €8,651.25 in annual savings compared to current €985/month (€11,820 annually). All rates guaranteed and binding with 6-week implementation timeline including 30-day overlap protection."
